allow: Bash(mysql -u root -P 3307 --protocol=tcp mirabella_ceylon -e "SHOW CREATE TABLE reviews\\G")
Bash(mysql -u root -P 3307 mirabella_ceylon -e "SHOW CREATE TABLE reviews\\G")
Bash(mysql -u root -P 3307 --protocol=tcp mirabella_ceylon -e "SELECT id, product_id, customer_id, reviewer_name, rating, is_approved, created_at FROM reviews ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;")

Bash(mysql -u root -P 3307 --protocol=tcp mirabella_ceylon -e "SELECT r.id, r.product_id, r.reviewer_name, r.is_approved, p.id as pid, p.name as product_name FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = r.product_id ORDER BY r.id DESC;")
Bash(mysql -u root -P 3307 --protocol=tcp mirabella_ceylon -e "SELECT * FROM reviews ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;")

Bash(mysql -u root -P 3307 --protocol=tcp mirabella_ceylon -e "SELECT r.*, p.name AS product_name, p.id AS pid FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = r.product_id WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY r.is_approved ASC, r.created_at DESC;")

Bash(mysql -u root -P 3307 --protocol=tcp mirabella_ceylon -e "SELECT \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM orders WHERE status='pending'\) AS orders, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM messages WHERE is_read=0\) AS messages, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM reviews WHERE is_approved=0\) AS reviews, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM customers WHERE DATE\(created_at\)=CURDATE\(\)\) AS customers;")
Bash(mysql -u root -P 3307 --protocol=tcp mirabella_ceylon -e "SELECT name, email, LEFT\(password_hash,20\) as pw_start FROM admin_users;")

Bash(mysql -u root -P 3307 --protocol=tcp mirabella_ceylon -e "SELECT key_name, value FROM site_settings WHERE key_name IN \('maintenance_mode','store_email','store_phone','smtp_host','store_name'\) ORDER BY key_name;")

Bash(mysql -u root -P 3307 --protocol=tcp mirabella_ceylon -e "SELECT key_name, value FROM settings WHERE key_name IN \('maintenance_mode','store_email','store_phone','smtp_host','store_name','whatsapp_number','store_currency'\) ORDER BY key_name;")

Bash(mysql -u root -P 3307 --protocol=tcp mirabella_ceylon -e "DESCRIBE settings; SELECT * FROM settings WHERE \\`key\\` IN \('maintenance_mode','store_email','store_phone','smtp_host','store_name','whatsapp_number'\) LIMIT 20;")
Bash(mysql -u root -P 3307 --protocol=tcp mirabella_ceylon -e "SELECT o.id, o.order_number, o.customer_id, o.customer_name, o.status, o.total_usd FROM orders o ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 10;")
Bash(mysql -u root -P 3307 --protocol=tcp mirabella_ceylon -e "SELECT id, first_name, last_name, email FROM customers LIMIT 5;")
